style_and_layout: Using the provided 1x2 reference image as a strict style and composition guide, create a retro 8-bit pixel-art sprite sheet. The image must contain exactly two figures side-by-side. Use a chunky 1:2.5 head-to-body ratio, thick black outlines, and a strictly limited color palette with hard pixel edges. The background must be solid bright magenta (#FF00FF).
state_neutral: On the strictly left side of the canvas: The character is in a confident, upright neutral stance looking unpleasant with a slight frown. This left figure has NO dizzy stars, NO sweat, and NO money.
state_defeated: On the strictly right side of the canvas: The character is in a comedic, slouched defeated pose. This right figure features X-eyes (✕), dizzy stars circling their head, sweat drops, and loose money bills scattered nearby. The defeat is purely comedic and cartoonish, with no graphic injury.
